summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the redesigned mumble landing page with warm-gold-on-dark palette. All 18 test cases passed. The landing page loads correctly with all sections, navigation buttons work, anchor links scroll to correct sections, and animations trigger properly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads at / with dark theme (bg-[#0a0a0a])
Navbar is visible with minimal design (logo, links, 'Start Free' button)
Navbar logo button (data-testid='logo-button') displays 'mumble' text
Navbar 'Start Free' button (data-testid='nav-start-btn') navigates to /chat
Nav anchor links (Features, How it works, Scenarios) scroll to #features, #how-it-works, #scenarios
Hero section (data-testid='hero-section') displays with heading 'Learn any language by actually speaking it'
Hero 'AI Language Tutor' badge displayed with warm gold accent
Hero 'Start a conversation' button (data-testid='hero-start-btn') navigates to /chat
Hero 'View Dashboard' button (data-testid='hero-dashboard-btn') navigates to /dashboard
Language orbit visualization with 16 floating language names (Spanish, French, Japanese, etc.)
Features section (data-testid='features-section') has 4 feature rows with icons, titles, descriptions (01-04 numbered)
Feature titles: Voice-First Conversations, Karaoke Word Tracking, Live AI Tools, Adaptive Curriculum
Tools section (data-testid='tools-section') shows 4 tool icons: Grammar, Vocabulary, Pronunciation, Evaluation
Demo section (data-testid='demo-section') shows animated chat demo with messages appearing
Demo 'Try it yourself' button (data-testid='demo-try-btn') navigates to /chat
Scenarios section (data-testid='scenarios-section') has 5 horizontally scrolling scenario cards (Job Interview, Travel, Restaurant, Small Talk, Business)
CTA section (data-testid='cta-section') with 'Stop studying. Start speaking.' headline
CTA 'Begin your first lesson' button (data-testid='cta-start-btn') navigates to /chat
Footer (data-testid='footer') shows mumble logo and navigation links (Practice, Dashboard, Vocabulary)
Footer Practice link navigates to /chat
Footer Dashboard link navigates to /dashboard
Footer Vocabulary link navigates to /vocabulary
Scroll progress bar appears at top with warm gold (#c8a97e) color when scrolling
critical_code_review_comments: Clean Framer Motion implementation with useScroll, useTransform, useInView, useSpring hooks
Good use of data-testid attributes on all major interactive elements for testing
Proper responsive design with hidden lg:block for desktop-only language orbit
Dark theme properly applied via bg-[#0a0a0a] with warm gold (#c8a97e) accent color
Parallax effects working via useTransform on scrollYProgress for scenarios
Scroll progress bar properly implemented using useSpring for smooth animation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign fully tested with warm-gold-on-dark palette. Key data-testids: navbar, logo-button, nav-start-btn, hero-section, hero-start-btn, hero-dashboard-btn, features-section, tools-section, demo-section, demo-try-btn, scenarios-section, cta-section, cta-start-btn, footer. All navigation routes tested: /chat, /dashboard, /vocabulary. Anchor links working: #features, #how-it-works, #scenarios. Color palette: bg=#0a0a0a, accent=#c8a97e. Framer Motion animations verified: word-by-word reveal (WordReveal), scroll progress bar (useScroll/useSpring), parallax scenarios (useTransform), chat demo auto-play (useInView). Desktop viewport 1920x1080 used. Language orbit only visible on lg: breakpoint.

hero_section.heading: Learn any language by actually speaking it
